docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-03-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, DAMIEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TREVOR DOHERTY ELECTRIC, INC.
